title: SK Hynix files confidentially for U.S. listing as it rides 'unprecedented growth' in memory market
summary_full: SK Hynix has made a confidential filing for a potential listing in the U.S. this year, as the company looks to expand production.
summary_public: SK Hynix has made a confidential filing for a potential listing in the U.S. this year, as the company looks to expand production.
